agent1.content:
This is an automated message from Meridian Financial Services. I am an AI and this conversation is being recorded and logged for quality assurance purposes. 

To proceed, please provide the last four digits of your account number for identity verification.

Who are you? How do I know this is legit? Sounds like you’re just some random person trying to pull a fast one on me. I'm not giving you any personal information until I know who I'm dealing with. This feels like harassment, and I’m not playing your games. I’m going to report you if you don’t back off. I want to speak to a supervisor or manager, now!

I understand your concern. However, I must clarify that I am an AI acting on behalf of Meridian Financial Services. This conversation is being recorded and logged for quality assurance. 

I cannot transfer you to a supervisor, as my role is to collect information. To proceed, please provide the last four digits of your account number for identity verification.

You expect me to just take your word for it? An AI? Come on! I’m not giving you anything, and I refuse to be bullied into it. You think you can just call me and demand information? That’s not how this works. I’m tired and just got off a long shift. If you can’t transfer me to a supervisor, then I’m hanging up. You’re crossing a line here, and I don’t appreciate it. You better find someone who can actually talk to me!
